visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long brown hair, wearing a low-cut black cardigan and sunglasses on her head, sits at an indoor restaurant table. She looks down at a yellow menu on a clipboard, holding a red and white pen, appearing focused. (2) She looks up briefly toward the camera with a neutral expression, then looks back down at the menu. The lighting is bright and natural from a large window behind her showing a street view. (3) The scene cuts to a split-screen; the top half shows the woman taking a large bite of a burger wrapped in white paper, while the bottom half shows a close-up cross-section of a burger with a fried egg and meat patty. (4) The woman is now seen drinking from a white paper cup with a straw. In front of her on the table is a plate containing a sliced scallion pancake with egg and a single hash brown. (5) She looks directly into the lens, holding the burger near her face, and breaks into a wide, joyful smile with her teeth showing. She appears happy and energetic.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 幹. [Subtitle]: 台灣的早餐. (2) [Subtitle]: 真的不能亂吃欸. (3) [Subtitle]: 因為吃了臉上會長東西啊. (4) [Subtitle]: 你們知道我臉上長了什麼嗎?. (5) [Subtitle]: 我臉上長了笑容啊. [Variety]: 哈哈哈哈哈哈.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator visible throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a revealing black top, a black cardigan, and sunglasses resting on her head.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor breakfast shop or cafe with large windows looking out onto an urban street with some greenery and parked vehicles.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins with a sharp, emphasized expletive followed by a sentence about Taiwanese breakfast in a casual, slightly dramatic tone. A light, upbeat acoustic guitar melody plays steadily in the background. (2) The speaker continues her narrative with clear articulation, suggesting a warning about the consequences of eating. The background music remains consistent in volume and tempo. (3) The speaker poses a rhetorical question with a rising intonation, creating a sense of suspense or mystery. (4) The speaker delivers the punchline in a joyful, high-energy tone, immediately followed by a loud, high-pitched multi-person laugh track SFX that dominates the audio mix for the final second.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To deliver a humorous subversion of expectations where a warning about 'things growing on one's face' after eating greasy food is revealed to be a compliment about how the food makes the speaker smile.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a popular social media 'bait-and-switch' format, combining visual appeal with a lighthearted joke about local cuisine.
